title: Colorado Place→Tract Spatial Membership
description: Schema for the place→tract spatial membership lookup produced by scripts/hna/build_place_tract_membership.py. Foundation for the TIGER PR-C2/C3 spatial-join arc that aggregates tract-level CHAS to accurate place-level CHAS even for jurisdictions that span multiple counties.

places.description: Map of place GEOID (7-digit: state(2) + place(5)) to the list of tracts the place overlaps.

place_area_sqm.description: Area of the place polygon in square meters (UTM zone 13N projection).

tracts.description: Tracts that overlap this place, sorted by share_of_place_area descending.

overlap_area_sqm.description: Area of the place∩tract intersection in square meters.

share_of_place_area.description: overlap_area / place_area. Sum across tracts ≤ 1 (≈1 unless tracts don't tile the place perfectly — should always be 1 for incorporated places).

share_of_tract_area.description: overlap_area / tract_area. Multiply each tract's CHAS counts by this share to apportion tract data into the place (area-weighted apportionment, the standard MVP approach).
